statement.informal: `slip_ratio` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (vehicle_speed >= V_MIN ∧ vehicle_speed <= V_MAX ∧ wheel_omega >= 0.0 ∧ wheel_omega <= OMEGA_MAX ∧ wheel_radius >= R_MIN ∧ wheel_radius <= R_MAX), the function's result satisfies (result >= 0.0 ∧ result <= SLIP_MAX).
